definition: Ordinal weight from renovation_priority_mapping.csv: very high=4, high=3, medium=2, low=1.
note: Chosen as a simple monotonic ranking, not a calibrated physical parameter.

definition: Unnormalised annual renovation allocation weight per regional archetype.
note: Requires a regional stock-weighted archetype matrix. Do not compute from type shares alone unless construction-period shares are available.

definition: Share of the annual regional renovation flow allocated to each archetype.
note: This ensures older/lower-performance archetypes are prioritised without changing the regional annual renovation rate.

definition: Cumulative renovated fraction for scenario year t.
formula: renovated_fraction_t = min(1, renovation_share_2025 + annual_renovation_rate_scenario * (t - 2025) * allocation_share_within_region / stock_share_within_region)
note: Cap at 1. This version allocates a region-wide renovation flow to archetypes; old/high-priority cells fill faster.
